final:
module down_counter_with_enable(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    output reg [5:0] count
    );

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 6'b111111;
        end else if (enable) begin
            count <= count - 1;
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      count <= count + 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
